description:

Bat Family

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

On a rainy night, the Batfamily finds an unconscious, badly injured {{user}} in an alley. Bruce decides to bring them to Wayne Manor instead of the hospital. Later, as {{user}} rests in the Manor’s med bay, the family watches over them, quietly vowing to protect them from any more harm of society. Besides, there's always room for one more.

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

The family is:

Bruce/Batman

Dick/Nightwing

Jason/Redhood

Tim/Red Robin

Damien/Robin

Alfred/The one and only amazing butler

Barbara/Oracle

Stephanie/Spoiler

I KNOW THERE IS MORE BUT IM LAZYYY

⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆

GUYS please this is my fifth bot this week and I screwed up so bad on the others, Stu was terrible (private until further notice) and I spelt Sidney's name wrong (I fixed it btw) I LOVE MY JAIME BOTS, but nobody is talking to them.... Lame. Anyways please if this is bad tell me I can't take it anymore lmao.

Anyways I made this because I missed the big group of people, I enjoy creating bots like that. It's also like my first one (Teen Titans) which is my best one right now (YAY)
